---
title: "Using Phase Contrast 4D-STEM to solve 3D Inorganic and Biological Nanostructures"
type: "article"
author: "C. Ophus, S. Ribet, G. Varnavides, P. M. Pelz"
year: "2024"
publication: "Microscopy and Microanalysis 30"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1093/mam/ozae044.883"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - electron microscopy
  - nanoparticles
  - chemistry
  - biology
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 0
fwci: 0.00
citation_percentile: 4.8
oa_status: closed
keywords:
  - "Phase contrast microscopy"
  - "Nanostructure"
  - "Nanotechnology"
metrics_updated: "2026-05-04T07:24:55Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Using Phase Contrast 4D-STEM to solve 3D Inorganic and Biological Nanostructures
C. Ophus, S. Ribet, G. Varnavides, P. M. Pelz
Microscopy and Microanalysis 30


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
